description: Exclude control-vs-treatment FP regression: two dirs trip StringEquality; treatment excludes it by name (QD-1699) and path-scoped under excluded/ (QD-1473). network bridge: Qodana auto-downloads projectJDK 17.

expectations.reason: Control run finds the planted StringEquality under planted/ (CI-confirmed id); the treatment then excludes it.
Control run also finds the SAME StringEquality under excluded/, proving the path-scoped exclude (not the absence of a defect) is what removes it in treatment.
Exclude-by-name (qodana.treatment.yaml `exclude: - name: StringEquality`) must remove the rule project-wide, including under planted/ (QD-1699).
Path-scoped exclude (qodana.treatment.yaml `exclude: - name: All, paths: [excluded]`) must remove findings under excluded/ (QD-1473).
